Ice Cream LA Mousse Hash blends dessert-smooth flavour with balanced indica relaxation in a premium, solventless concentrate. Because this is LA Mousse Hash, the texture stays light, airy, and easy to work with. As a result, it crumbles effortlessly, melts cleanly, and burns smoothly. Whether you sprinkle it into a bowl, roll it into a joint, or press it gently, Ice Cream LA Mousse delivers consistent flavour and potency every time.
